es.title: Rotata | Sistemas de crecimiento B2B con CRM, datos e IA
es.description: Rotata diseña e implementa sistemas estructurados de marketing y ventas B2B con CRM, automatización, datos e IA.
es.h1: Construimos el sistema detrás de tu crecimiento
es.intro: Diseñamos la estructura que conecta estrategia, datos, CRM, automatización y pipeline para que marketing y ventas operen con claridad.

sections.heading: El crecimiento parece impredecible cuando el sistema no está claro
sections.body: La mayoría de problemas no nacen por falta de herramientas. Nacen porque datos, procesos, equipos y reporting no siguen una arquitectura común.
items: Marketing y ventas midiendo cosas distintas

sections.heading: Construimos sistemas estructurados de crecimiento B2B
sections.body: Rotata convierte herramientas como HubSpot, ZoomInfo, La Growth Machine y Synapsale en una infraestructura operativa orientada a resultados.

items.title: Arquitectura CRM
items.text: Modelo de datos, lifecycle stages, pipelines y reporting diseñados para representar la realidad comercial.

items.title: Automatización comercial
items.text: Flujos que reducen fricción, mantienen seguimiento consistente y conectan marketing con ventas.

items.title: Inteligencia de cuentas
items.text: Datos, señales e intent que ayudan a priorizar cuentas con mayor probabilidad de avanzar.

items.title: Sistema outbound
items.text: Segmentación, secuencias, mensajes y medición para que la prospección no dependa de improvisación.

sections.heading: Qué incluye tu sistema de crecimiento
sections.body: Estrategia, datos, CRM, automatización, outbound, reporting y optimización trabajan como una secuencia: herramienta → sistema → resultado.

sections.heading: Cómo trabajamos
sections.body: Diagnosticamos la estructura actual, diseñamos el sistema, lo implementamos y lo optimizamos con métricas compartidas.

sections.heading: Construido para resultados medibles
sections.body: No prometemos cifras inventadas. Diseñamos el sistema para medir conversión, velocidad, calidad de lead, eficiencia comercial y contribución a pipeline.

sections.heading: Impulsado por plataformas líderes
sections.body: Las herramientas soportan el sistema. El sistema es el producto.

sections.heading: Insights sobre crecimiento B2B, IA y sistemas de marketing
sections.body: Usamos el contenido existente de Rotata y lo ordenamos en una biblioteca editorial preparada para crecer.

en.title: Rotata | B2B growth systems with CRM, data and AI
en.description: Rotata designs and implements structured B2B marketing and sales systems with CRM, automation, data and AI.
en.h1: We build the system behind your growth
en.intro: We design the structure that connects strategy, data, CRM, automation and pipeline so marketing and sales operate with clarity.

sections.heading: Growth feels unpredictable when the system behind it is unclear
sections.body: Most growth problems are not caused by missing tools. They come from data, process, teams and reporting running without one architecture.
items: Dashboards that do not guide decisions
Marketing and sales measuring different things

sections.heading: We build structured B2B growth systems
sections.body: Rotata turns tools like HubSpot, ZoomInfo, La Growth Machine and Synapsale into an operating infrastructure focused on outcomes.

items.title: CRM architecture
items.text: Data model, lifecycle stages, pipelines and reporting designed around the real sales process.

items.title: Sales automation
items.text: Workflows that reduce friction, keep follow-up consistent and connect marketing with sales.

items.title: Account intelligence
items.text: Data, signals and intent used to prioritize accounts with a higher chance of moving forward.

items.title: Outbound system
items.text: Targeting, sequences, messaging and measurement so prospecting is not improvised.

sections.heading: What your growth system includes
sections.body: Strategy, data, CRM, automation, outbound, reporting and optimization work as one sequence: tool → system → outcome.

sections.heading: How we work
sections.body: We diagnose the current structure, design the system, implement it and optimize it through shared metrics.

sections.heading: Built for measurable outcomes
sections.body: We do not invent results. We design the system to measure conversion, velocity, lead quality, sales efficiency and pipeline contribution.

sections.heading: Powered by leading platforms
sections.body: Tools support the system. The system is the product.

sections.heading: Insights on B2B growth, AI and marketing systems
sections.body: The existing Rotata content is organized into an editorial engine built to scale.

fr.title: Rotata | Systèmes de croissance B2B avec CRM, données et IA
fr.description: Rotata conçoit et met en œuvre des systèmes marketing et commerciaux B2B structurés avec CRM, automatisation, données et IA.
fr.h1: Nous construisons le système derrière votre croissance
fr.intro: Nous concevons la structure qui relie stratégie, données, CRM, automatisation et pipeline pour aligner marketing et ventes.

sections.heading: La croissance semble imprévisible quand le système n'est pas clair
sections.body: La plupart des problèmes ne viennent pas d'un manque d'outils, mais de données, processus, équipes et reporting sans architecture commune.
items: Dashboards qui n'éclairent pas les décisions
Marketing et ventes avec des mesures différentes

sections.heading: Nous construisons des systèmes B2B structurés
sections.body: Rotata transforme HubSpot, ZoomInfo, La Growth Machine et Synapsale en infrastructure opérationnelle orientée résultats.

items.title: Architecture CRM
items.text: Modèle de données, cycles de vie, pipelines et reporting conçus autour du processus commercial réel.

items.title: Automatisation commerciale
items.text: Workflows qui réduisent la friction, sécurisent le suivi et relient marketing et ventes.

items.title: Intelligence comptes
items.text: Données, signaux et intention pour prioriser les comptes les plus susceptibles d'avancer.

items.title: Système outbound
items.text: Ciblage, séquences, messages et mesure pour éviter une prospection improvisée.

sections.heading: Ce que comprend votre système
sections.body: Stratégie, données, CRM, automatisation, outbound, reporting et optimisation fonctionnent comme une séquence: outil → système → résultat.

sections.heading: Notre méthode
sections.body: Nous diagnostiquons la structure, concevons le système, l'implémentons puis l'optimisons avec des métriques partagées.

sections.heading: Conçu pour des résultats mesurables
sections.body: Nous concevons le système pour mesurer conversion, vitesse, qualité des leads, efficacité commerciale et contribution au pipeline.

sections.heading: Propulsé par des plateformes leaders
sections.body: Les outils soutiennent le système. Le système est le produit.

sections.heading: Insights sur la croissance B2B, l'IA et les systèmes marketing
sections.body: Le contenu Rotata existant devient un moteur éditorial structuré.

es.title: Sobre Rotata | Partner de crecimiento B2B
es.description: Rotata diseña los sistemas detrás del crecimiento B2B: CRM, datos, automatización y alineación marketing-ventas.
es.h1: Diseñamos los sistemas detrás del crecimiento B2B
es.intro: Rotata existe para poner estructura donde el crecimiento se ha vuelto difícil de medir, escalar o explicar.

sections.heading: Quiénes somos
sections.body: Una compañía B2B growth system que trabaja entre estrategia, operaciones, CRM, datos, automatización e IA aplicada.

sections.heading: Por qué existimos
sections.body: Muchas empresas compran herramientas antes de definir la lógica que debe gobernarlas. Nosotros invertimos ese orden.

sections.heading: Misión, visión y valores
sections.body: Construir sistemas de crecimiento serios, medibles y sostenibles para empresas B2B que necesitan claridad operativa.

en.title: About Rotata | B2B growth partner
en.description: Rotata designs the systems behind B2B growth: CRM, data, automation and marketing-sales alignment.
en.h1: We design the systems behind B2B growth
en.intro: Rotata exists to bring structure where growth has become hard to measure, scale or explain.

sections.heading: Who we are
sections.body: Rotata is a B2B growth system company. We design and implement the structure behind marketing, sales, CRM, data and automation so teams can operate from one commercial reality.
items: B2B companies with complex sales cycles
Teams using HubSpot or preparing to implement it
Sales and marketing leaders who need cleaner pipeline visibility
Founders who need growth to become operationally repeatable

sections.heading: Why we exist
sections.body: Most companies do not fail because they lack tools. They fail because every tool follows a different logic. Rotata exists to turn disconnected activity into a controlled system.
items: Decisions based on the same data model

sections.heading: What Rotata builds
sections.body: We build the operating layer that allows demand generation, outbound, CRM, reporting and account intelligence to work together.

items.title: Commercial architecture
items.text: Lifecycle stages, pipeline logic, handoffs and reporting designed around how revenue actually moves.

items.title: CRM and data structure
items.text: Fields, properties, lists, segmentation and dashboards that support decisions instead of creating noise.

items.title: Automation systems
items.text: Workflows, routing and follow-up that reduce manual friction while keeping human control.

items.title: Acquisition systems
items.text: Outbound, content, SEO and account intelligence connected to conversion and pipeline.

sections.heading: Our approach
sections.body: We do not begin with a software recommendation. We begin with diagnosis, then design the system, implement it, and optimize it with measured feedback.

sections.heading: Mission
sections.body: Our mission is to make B2B growth more structured, measurable and controllable for companies that depend on marketing and sales alignment.

sections.heading: Vision
sections.body: Rotata should be the partner companies call when growth activity exists, but the system behind it is not yet clear enough to scale.
items: Revenue teams working from one source of truth

sections.heading: Values
sections.body: The work is technical, but the principles are simple: clarity, precision, accountability and measurable outcomes.

sections.heading: Clients we are built for
sections.body: Rotata is designed for B2B organizations where pipeline quality, CRM discipline and commercial process matter.

sections.heading: How the work looks
sections.body: The output is not a presentation. It is a working system: CRM structure, workflows, dashboards, data rules, content flows and commercial operating rhythm.

sections.heading: Technology stack
sections.body: Tools support the system. We work with leading platforms when they serve the operating model.

sections.heading: Leadership and operating model
sections.body: Rotata works as a senior implementation partner: strategic enough to diagnose the system, technical enough to build it, and practical enough to keep it usable.

fr.title: À propos de Rotata | Partenaire croissance B2B
fr.description: Rotata conçoit les systèmes derrière la croissance B2B: CRM, données, automatisation et alignement marketing-ventes.
fr.h1: Nous concevons les systèmes derrière la croissance B2B
fr.intro: Rotata apporte de la structure là où la croissance devient difficile à mesurer, scaler ou expliquer.

sections.heading: Qui nous sommes
sections.body: Une société de systèmes de croissance B2B entre stratégie, opérations, CRM, données, automatisation et IA appliquée.

sections.heading: Pourquoi nous existons
sections.body: Beaucoup d'entreprises achètent des outils avant de définir la logique qui doit les gouverner. Nous inversons cet ordre.

sections.heading: Mission, vision et valeurs
sections.body: Construire des systèmes de croissance sérieux, mesurables et durables pour les entreprises B2B.

en.title: Solutions | AI-driven marketing and sales systems
en.description: Structured systems for B2B growth: strategy, data, CRM, automation, outbound and reporting.
en.intro: We connect strategy, data, CRM, automation, outbound and conversion into a measurable architecture.

sections.heading: The problem: growth activity without operating structure
sections.body: Campaigns, CRM, outbound, automation and reporting often grow in separate layers. The result is activity that looks busy but does not produce clear pipeline decisions.
items: Reports that do not explain next actions

sections.heading: Overview: one system behind marketing and sales
sections.body: Rotata creates the shared architecture that connects acquisition, data, CRM, automation, sales handoff, reporting and optimization.

sections.heading: Systems we design
sections.body: Each system is designed around the same sequence: tool to system to outcome.

items.title: CRM operating system
items.text: Data model, properties, lifecycle stages, pipeline views and dashboards.

items.title: Acquisition system
items.text: SEO, content, lead generation and conversion paths connected to CRM.

items.title: Outbound system
items.text: Targeting, signals, sequences, messaging and performance tracking.

items.title: RevOps system
items.text: Shared definitions, handoffs, automation and business reporting.

sections.heading: Services
sections.body: Rotata can diagnose, design, implement and optimize the system depending on the maturity of your current setup.

sections.heading: Tools
sections.body: Tools are selected because they support the architecture, not because the tool itself is the product.
items: La Growth Machine for structured outbound

sections.heading: Process
sections.body: We move from diagnosis to implementation through controlled phases so the system stays understandable.

sections.heading: Outcomes
sections.body: The goal is pipeline clarity: better data, cleaner handoffs, stronger prioritization and decisions that can be defended.

en.title: HubSpot, structured for how your business actually works | Rotata
en.description: HubSpot should not be a repository of activity. It should be the infrastructure that makes selling, measuring and deciding easier.
en.h1: HubSpot, structured for how your business actually works
en.intro: HubSpot should not be a repository of activity. It should be the infrastructure that makes selling, measuring and deciding easier.

sections.heading: Context
sections.body: HubSpot becomes powerful when the business structure underneath it is clear. Without that structure, the platform simply exposes confusion faster.

sections.heading: Problem
sections.body: Teams often buy HubSpot expecting clarity, but import messy data, unclear stages, duplicated fields and workflows that mirror old habits.

sections.heading: What Rotata does
sections.body: We structure HubSpot around the real commercial process: data model, lifecycle stages, pipelines, workflows, lists, dashboards and handoffs.

items.title: Diagnose
items.text: Map the current setup and identify structural blockers.

items.title: Design
items.text: Define the operating model, data rules and conversion path.

items.title: Implement
items.text: Configure the system in tools the team already uses.

items.title: Measure
items.text: Connect dashboards and feedback loops to business decisions.

sections.heading: Outcomes
sections.body: HubSpot should make decisions easier: who to prioritize, what changed, what sales needs, and where pipeline is blocked.

sections.heading: When it is relevant
sections.body: This matters when HubSpot exists but reporting is weak, automation is inconsistent, sales adoption is low or leadership cannot trust the data.

sections.heading: System integration
sections.body: HubSpot connects to the wider growth system: acquisition, outbound, account intelligence, analytics and reporting rhythm.

fr.title: HubSpot, structuré selon votre fonctionnement réel | Rotata
fr.description: HubSpot ne doit pas être un simple dépôt d'activité. Il doit aider à vendre, mesurer et décider.

en.title: Better data, used properly | Rotata
en.description: More data does not equal more growth. Value appears when account intelligence connects to CRM and sales process.
en.intro: More data does not equal more growth. Value appears when account intelligence connects to CRM and sales process.

sections.heading: Context
sections.body: Better data only creates value when it is structured, filtered and connected to the commercial workflow.

sections.heading: Problem
sections.body: More contacts can create more noise. Without targeting logic, data quality rules and CRM routing, teams burn time on the wrong accounts.

sections.heading: What Rotata does
sections.body: We turn ZoomInfo into a usable data layer: ICP definition, segmentation, enrichment logic, routing, lists and CRM activation.

items.title: Diagnose
items.text: Map the current setup and identify structural blockers.

items.title: Design
items.text: Define the operating model, data rules and conversion path.

items.title: Implement
items.text: Configure the system in tools the team already uses.

items.title: Measure
items.text: Connect dashboards and feedback loops to business decisions.

sections.heading: Outcomes
sections.body: The output is not a larger database. It is cleaner targeting, better prioritization and data that supports pipeline decisions.

sections.heading: When it is relevant
sections.body: Use this when teams need to improve targeting, enrich CRM records, validate segments or support outbound with better account data.

sections.heading: System integration
sections.body: ZoomInfo feeds the growth system through HubSpot properties, workflows, campaigns, outbound sequences and reporting.

en.title: Outbound that is structured, not improvised | Rotata
en.description: We design multichannel prospecting with targeting, message relevance, sequences and performance tracking.
en.h1: Outbound that is structured, not improvised
en.intro: We design multichannel prospecting with targeting, message relevance, sequences and performance tracking.

sections.heading: Context
sections.body: Outbound works when targeting, timing, message relevance and measurement are structured as one system.

sections.heading: Problem
sections.body: Improvised outbound creates low response rates, inconsistent follow-up and no clear learning loop between sales activity and CRM data.

sections.heading: What Rotata does
sections.body: We design the outbound system: ICP, account lists, data checks, multichannel sequences, messaging, CRM sync and performance dashboards.

items.title: Diagnose
items.text: Map the current setup and identify structural blockers.

items.title: Design
items.text: Define the operating model, data rules and conversion path.

items.title: Implement
items.text: Configure the system in tools the team already uses.

items.title: Measure
items.text: Connect dashboards and feedback loops to business decisions.

sections.heading: Outcomes
sections.body: The goal is more qualified conversations with a repeatable learning loop, not more generic messages.

sections.heading: When it is relevant
sections.body: Use this when sales teams need more meetings, existing campaigns lack structure or outbound activity is not visible inside CRM.

sections.heading: System integration
sections.body: La Growth Machine and related tooling support the system through sequences, LinkedIn activity, email steps and CRM-connected measurement.

fr.title: Outbound structuré, pas improvisé | Rotata
fr.description: Nous concevons une prospection multicanale avec ciblage, pertinence des messages, séquences et mesure.
fr.intro: Nous concevons une prospection multicanale avec ciblage, pertinence des messages, séquences et mesure.

sections.heading: Problème
sections.body: Un outil seul ne corrige pas un processus faible. Sans structure, l'opération amplifie le désordre.

sections.heading: Ce que fait Rotata
sections.body: Nous concevons l'architecture opérationnelle: données, processus, automatisation, reporting et handoffs.

items.title: Architecture CRM
items.text: Modèle de données, cycles de vie, pipelines et reporting conçus autour du processus commercial réel.

items.title: Automatisation commerciale
items.text: Workflows qui réduisent la friction, sécurisent le suivi et relient marketing et ventes.

items.title: Intelligence comptes
items.text: Données, signaux et intention pour prioriser les comptes les plus susceptibles d'avancer.

items.title: Système outbound
items.text: Ciblage, séquences, messages et mesure pour éviter une prospection improvisée.

sections.heading: Résultats visés
sections.body: Plus de visibilité, meilleure priorisation, moins de friction et une façon commune de mesurer la croissance.

sections.heading: Quand c'est pertinent
sections.body: Quand l'outil doit devenir le système opérationnel de croissance, pas une couche d'activité de plus.

es.title: Foco en cuentas que realmente muestran interés | Rotata
es.description: Las señales de cuenta sirven para priorizar timing, relevancia y reuniones cualificadas, no para añadir ruido al CRM.
es.h1: Foco en cuentas que realmente muestran interés
es.intro: Las señales de cuenta sirven para priorizar timing, relevancia y reuniones cualificadas, no para añadir ruido al CRM.

sections.heading: Problema
sections.body: La herramienta por sí sola no corrige un proceso mal diseñado. Si no existe estructura, la operación escala el desorden.

sections.heading: Qué hace Rotata
sections.body: Diseñamos la arquitectura operativa: datos, procesos, automatización, reporting y handoffs entre equipos.

items.title: Arquitectura CRM
items.text: Modelo de datos, lifecycle stages, pipelines y reporting diseñados para representar la realidad comercial.

items.title: Automatización comercial
items.text: Flujos que reducen fricción, mantienen seguimiento consistente y conectan marketing con ventas.

items.title: Inteligencia de cuentas
items.text: Datos, señales e intent que ayudan a priorizar cuentas con mayor probabilidad de avanzar.

items.title: Sistema outbound
items.text: Segmentación, secuencias, mensajes y medición para que la prospección no dependa de improvisación.

sections.heading: Resultados que buscamos
sections.body: Mejor visibilidad, mejor priorización, menos fricción y una forma común de medir el crecimiento.

sections.heading: Cuándo tiene sentido
sections.body: Cuando quieres que la herramienta se convierta en sistema operativo de crecimiento, no en otra capa de actividad.

en.title: Focus on accounts that actually show interest | Rotata
en.description: Account signals help prioritize timing, relevance and qualified meetings instead of adding noise to the CRM.
en.h1: Focus on accounts that actually show interest
en.intro: Account signals help prioritize timing, relevance and qualified meetings instead of adding noise to the CRM.

sections.heading: Context
sections.body: Account signals help teams focus on companies already showing relevant interest or movement.

sections.heading: Problem
sections.body: Without prioritization, sales teams chase static lists while warmer accounts move unnoticed.

sections.heading: What Rotata does
sections.body: We connect account signals to prioritization rules, CRM workflows, sales tasks and campaign timing.

items.title: Diagnose
items.text: Map the current setup and identify structural blockers.

items.title: Design
items.text: Define the operating model, data rules and conversion path.

items.title: Implement
items.text: Configure the system in tools the team already uses.

items.title: Measure
items.text: Connect dashboards and feedback loops to business decisions.

sections.heading: Outcomes
sections.body: The system helps teams act on timing, focus on better-fit accounts and turn interest into qualified meetings.

sections.heading: When it is relevant
sections.body: Use this when sales capacity is limited, account timing matters or teams need a clearer signal layer before outreach.

sections.heading: System integration
sections.body: Synapsale-style signals feed HubSpot, outbound sequences, lifecycle changes and dashboards so intent becomes action.

fr.title: Priorité aux comptes qui montrent un réel intérêt | Rotata
fr.description: Les signaux comptes aident à prioriser le timing, la pertinence et les rendez-vous qualifiés.

es.title: Blog | Insights sobre crecimiento B2B, IA y sistemas de marketing
es.description: Artículos de Rotata sobre CRM, HubSpot, datos, IA, generación de leads, outbound, SEO, estrategia y RevOps.
es.h1: Insights sobre crecimiento B2B, IA y sistemas de marketing
es.intro: Biblioteca editorial basada en el contenido existente de Rotata y preparada para crecer con nuevas piezas.

en.title: Blog | B2B growth, AI and marketing systems insights
en.description: Rotata insights on CRM, HubSpot, data, AI, lead generation, outbound, SEO, strategy and RevOps.
en.h1: Insights on B2B growth, AI and marketing systems
en.intro: An editorial library built from Rotata source material and ready to scale with new content.

sections.heading: Featured thinking
sections.body: The blog should work like a content machine: each article supports search, LinkedIn distribution, sales education and internal linking.

sections.heading: Categories
sections.body: The library is organized around the subjects Rotata should own in B2B growth systems.

sections.heading: Topics we publish around
sections.body: Every topic connects back to the core positioning: tools support the system, and the system creates the outcome.

sections.heading: Newsletter and content workflow
sections.body: The static site can display articles now, while the future WordPress export can make publishing editable by the client.

fr.title: Blog | Insights croissance B2B, IA et systèmes marketing
fr.description: Articles Rotata sur CRM, HubSpot, données, IA, génération de leads, outbound, SEO, stratégie et RevOps.
fr.h1: Insights sur la croissance B2B, l'IA et les systèmes marketing
fr.intro: Une bibliothèque éditoriale basée sur le contenu Rotata et prête à se développer.

es.title: Calculadora ROI | Marketing y ventas B2B
es.description: Calcula el retorno potencial de un sistema de marketing y ventas mejor estructurado.
es.h1: Calcula el ROI de tu sistema de marketing y ventas
es.intro: Antes de invertir en más herramientas, estima el impacto de mejorar conversión, velocidad comercial y calidad de datos.

sections.heading: Qué mide esta calculadora
sections.body: La calculadora estima valor incremental a partir de leads, conversión, ticket medio y mejora esperada del sistema.

sections.heading: Drivers de ROI
sections.body: El ROI no aparece por añadir software. Aparece cuando el sistema mejora foco, velocidad, conversión y trazabilidad.

en.title: ROI Calculator | B2B marketing and sales
en.description: Estimate the potential return from a better structured marketing and sales system.
en.h1: Calculate the ROI of your marketing and sales system
en.intro: Before investing in more tools, estimate the impact of improving conversion, sales velocity and data quality.

sections.heading: What the calculator explains
sections.body: ROI becomes easier to discuss when leads, conversion, deal value and system improvement are visible in one model.

sections.heading: Inputs before the calculator
sections.body: Use realistic numbers. The calculator is a diagnostic tool for thinking through commercial assumptions, not a financial guarantee.

sections.heading: How to read the result
sections.body: The result shows estimated incremental value if the system improves conversion or sales efficiency. It should trigger better questions, not replace a commercial model.
items: Where does the improvement come from?
What needs to change in the CRM?

sections.heading: ROI drivers
sections.body: The highest leverage usually comes from cleaner data, better prioritization, faster follow-up and stronger reporting.

sections.heading: Implementation logic
sections.body: A better ROI model depends on implementation: lifecycle stages, source tracking, CRM workflows, dashboards and sales rhythm.

sections.heading: FAQ
sections.body: The calculator is designed for a first diagnostic conversation and HubSpot-ready tracking hooks are already in place.
items: Is it exact? No, it is an estimate.
Can it connect to HubSpot? Yes, hooks are ready.
Can we adapt the formula? Yes, the static code is editable.

fr.title: Calculateur ROI | Marketing et ventes B2B
fr.description: Estimez le retour potentiel d'un système marketing et commercial mieux structuré.
fr.h1: Calculez le ROI de votre système marketing et ventes
fr.intro: Avant d'investir dans plus d'outils, estimez l'impact d'une meilleure conversion, vitesse commerciale et qualité de données.

sections.heading: Ce que mesure ce calculateur
sections.body: Il estime la valeur incrémentale à partir des leads, de la conversion, du panier moyen et de l'amélioration attendue.

sections.heading: Drivers de ROI
sections.body: Le ROI ne vient pas d'un logiciel de plus. Il vient d'un système qui améliore focus, vitesse, conversion et traçabilité.

es.title: Contacto | Hablemos de tu sistema actual
es.description: Contacta con Rotata para revisar tu CRM, datos, automatización, outbound o sistema de crecimiento B2B.
es.intro: Cuéntanos qué está pasando en tu CRM, pipeline, reporting o captación. Te responderemos con próximos pasos concretos.

sections.heading: Qué ocurre después
sections.body: Revisamos tu contexto, identificamos el área crítica y proponemos una conversación centrada en diagnóstico, no en venta genérica.

sections.heading: Para quién es
sections.body: Empresas B2B con ventas consultivas, CRM en uso o intención clara de ordenar marketing, ventas y datos.

sections.heading: Para quién no es
sections.body: No somos una fábrica de campañas sueltas ni un reseller que vende herramienta sin sistema.

en.title: Contact | Talk about your current setup
en.description: Contact Rotata to review your CRM, data, automation, outbound or B2B growth system.
en.h1: Let's talk about your current setup
en.intro: Tell us what is happening in your CRM, pipeline, reporting or demand generation. We will reply with concrete next steps.

sections.heading: Context
sections.body: The first conversation is about your current setup, not a generic sales pitch. We want to understand where the system is unclear.

sections.heading: What happens after contact
sections.body: You will get a practical review of where structure is missing and what should be fixed first.
items: We define the first system priorities

sections.heading: What you get
sections.body: The conversation should leave you with more clarity on how your current marketing and sales system is working.
items: Tool to system to outcome logic

sections.heading: Direct contact
sections.body: If you prefer direct contact, use WhatsApp, email or LinkedIn. All tracking hooks are prepared but no private keys are committed.

sections.heading: Who this is for
sections.body: The best fit is a B2B company that needs a more reliable system behind growth.

sections.heading: Who this is not for
sections.body: Rotata is not a quick-template agency or a tool reseller. If the goal is only a cheap campaign, this is probably not the right fit.

sections.heading: Reassurance
sections.body: The site is static-first now, Cloudflare-ready, and prepared for a future WordPress export so the client can edit content later.

fr.title: Contact | Parlons de votre configuration actuelle
fr.description: Contactez Rotata pour revoir votre CRM, données, automatisation, outbound ou système de croissance B2B.
fr.intro: Expliquez ce qui se passe dans votre CRM, pipeline, reporting ou acquisition. Nous répondrons avec des étapes concrètes.

sections.heading: Ce qui se passe ensuite
sections.body: Nous analysons le contexte, identifions la zone critique et proposons une conversation de diagnostic.

sections.heading: Pour qui
sections.body: Entreprises B2B avec vente consultative, CRM en place ou besoin clair de structurer marketing, ventes et données.

sections.heading: Pour qui ce n'est pas
sections.body: Nous ne sommes pas une usine à campagnes ni un revendeur d'outils sans système.

es.title: Casos | Patrones de sistema Rotata
es.description: Casos y patrones de trabajo de Rotata estructurados en problema, sistema y resultado.
es.h1: Casos estructurados por problema, sistema y resultado
es.intro: No inventamos métricas. Usamos placeholders honestos hasta documentar casos aprobados por cliente.

sections.heading: Patrón de caso
sections.body: Cada caso se documenta con el problema de negocio, el sistema implementado y el resultado verificable.

sections.heading: Áreas habituales
sections.body: CRM, reporting, automatización, outbound, datos de intención y alineación marketing-ventas.

en.title: Cases | Rotata system patterns
en.description: Rotata case patterns structured around problem, system and result.
en.h1: Cases structured by problem, system and result
en.intro: We do not fake metrics. Honest placeholders remain until approved client stories are documented.

sections.heading: Case detail pattern
sections.body: Real case studies should be published only when results can be defended. Until then, use the structure without inventing numbers.

sections.heading: Metrics to document
sections.body: Each future case should connect the system change to visible operating metrics.

fr.title: Cas | Patterns de système Rotata
fr.description: Cas Rotata structurés autour du problème, du système et du résultat.
fr.h1: Cas structurés par problème, système et résultat
fr.intro: Nous n'inventons pas de métriques. Les placeholders restent honnêtes jusqu'à validation client.

sections.heading: Pattern de cas
sections.body: Chaque cas documente le problème business, le système mis en œuvre et le résultat vérifiable.

sections.heading: Domaines fréquents
sections.body: CRM, reporting, automatisation, outbound, intent data et alignement marketing-ventes.

es.title: Proceso | De diagnóstico a escala
es.description: Proceso Rotata para diseñar, implementar y optimizar sistemas de crecimiento B2B.
es.h1: Un enfoque estructurado desde diagnóstico hasta escala
es.intro: El sistema se construye en fases para evitar automatizar problemas mal definidos.

sections.heading: Diagnosticar
sections.body: Mapeamos CRM, datos, pipeline, procesos, reporting, fricciones y objetivos comerciales.

sections.heading: Diseñar
sections.body: Definimos arquitectura, criterios, objetos, etapas, automatizaciones y medición antes de ejecutar.

sections.heading: Implementar
sections.body: Configuramos la estructura, migramos o limpiamos datos, activamos workflows y documentamos el sistema.

sections.heading: Optimizar
sections.body: Medimos el sistema en operación y ajustamos reglas, conversiones, reporting y calidad de entrada.

en.title: Process | From diagnosis to scale
en.description: Rotata process to design, implement and optimize B2B growth systems.
en.h1: A structured approach from diagnosis to scale
en.intro: The system is built in phases to avoid automating badly defined problems.

sections.heading: Diagnose
sections.body: We map the current system: CRM data, lifecycle stages, lead sources, workflows, outbound process, dashboards and handoffs.

sections.heading: Design
sections.body: We define the target operating architecture before changing tools.

sections.heading: Implement
sections.body: We configure the system in the tools the team uses, with documentation and clean handover.

sections.heading: Optimize
sections.body: We improve the system from evidence: conversion, velocity, quality and usage.

sections.heading: Timeline
sections.body: The right timeline depends on the current mess and the number of systems involved, but the process stays controlled.

fr.title: Processus | Du diagnostic à l'échelle
fr.description: Processus Rotata pour concevoir, implémenter et optimiser les systèmes de croissance B2B.
fr.h1: Une approche structurée du diagnostic à l'échelle
fr.intro: Le système se construit par phases pour éviter d'automatiser des problèmes mal définis.

sections.heading: Diagnostiquer
sections.body: Nous cartographions CRM, données, pipeline, processus, reporting, frictions et objectifs.

sections.heading: Concevoir
sections.body: Nous définissons architecture, critères, objets, étapes, automatisation et mesure avant exécution.

sections.heading: Implémenter
sections.body: Nous configurons la structure, nettoyons les données, activons les workflows et documentons.

sections.heading: Optimiser
sections.body: Nous mesurons le système en production et ajustons règles, conversions, reporting et qualité.
